_doc.purpose: Edit this file to toggle/configure AdSense without touching HTML.
_doc.enabled: Set false to disable all ads site-wide.
_doc.slots: Per-page slot ID. Leave empty until AdSense issues unit IDs (auto ad units only require publisher_id).
_doc.no_redeploy_note: Changes still require git push to GH Pages (~30s rebuild) but no HTML edits.
